explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Documentation highlights the company's AI strategy across various operational areas and mentions a 'center of excellence' for AI scientists. It also describes a collaborative approach to AI development involving business and AI scientists, and reports reference predictive planning for maintenance.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This article, "Norfolk Southern Using AI to Move the US Economy," provides evidence for **governance, oversight, and transparency**. It highlights the company's AI strategy across various operational areas, mentions a "center of excellence" for AI scientists, and describes a collaborative approach to AI development involving business and AI scientists, all of which demonstrate governance. The article also details oversight mechanisms, such as frequent board updates on AI initiatives and a human review step for AI-generated work orders. Finally, it showcases transparency through the description of AI use cases like predictive maintenance and digital train inspections, and by stating the deployment of AI solutions and their capabilities.
relevant_sources.title: Norfolk Southern Using AI to Move the US Economy

relevant_sources.summary: The Norfolk Southern 2024 ESG Report provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The report mentions AI and ML capabilities for trend analysis and operational optimization, and explicitly details AI models and algorithms, supporting transparency. Predictive planning for maintenance implies governance, though specific execution details or policy commitments are not provided.
relevant_sources.title: Norfolk Southern 2024 ESG Report

oversight.findings: Documentation details oversight mechanisms, which include frequent board updates on AI initiatives. It also describes a human review step for AI-generated work orders.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

summary.overall_findings: Norfolk Southern's public disclosures address transparency and oversight, detailing specific practices such as describing AI use cases like predictive maintenance and outlining a human review step for AI-generated work orders. These are among the three of seven evaluated responsible AI pillars for which documented evidence was found, with all three areas addressed at the policy level. Published materials also highlight governance, mentioning a 'center of excellence' for AI scientists and the company's AI strategy across various operational areas. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness, explainability, and 2 additional pillars. This assessment draws on a review of 12 publicly available sources.
